en: Now before the Feast of the Passover, when Jesus knew that his hour had come to depart out of this world to the Father, having loved his own who were in the world, he loved them to the end.
zh: 逾越節以前，耶穌知道自己離開這世界回到父那裡去的時候到了。他既然愛世上屬於自己的人，就愛他們到底。

en: During supper, when the devil had already put it into the heart of Judas Iscariot, Simon's son, to betray him,
zh: 吃晚飯的時候 ，

en: Jesus, knowing that the Father had given all things into his hands, and that he had come from God and was going back to God,
zh: 耶穌知道父已經把萬有交在他手中，並且知道自己從 神而來，又要回到 神那裡去，

en: rose from supper. He laid aside his outer garments, and taking a towel, tied it around his waist.
zh: 就起身離席，脫去外衣，拿一條手巾束腰。

en: Then he poured water into a basin and began to wash the disciples' feet and to wipe them with the towel that was wrapped around him.
zh: 然後他倒了一盆水，洗門徒的腳，並且用束腰的手巾擦乾。

en: He came to Simon Peter, who said to him, "Lord, do you wash my feet?"
zh: 輪到西門．彼得，彼得就說：“主啊，你要洗我的腳嗎？”

en: Jesus answered him, "What I am doing you do not understand now, but afterward you will understand."
zh: 耶穌回答：“我所作的，你現在不知道，以後就會明白。”

en: Peter said to him, "You shall never wash my feet." Jesus answered him, "If I do not wash you, you have no share with me."
zh: 彼得說：“不行，你千萬不可洗我的腳！”耶穌說：“如果我不洗你，你就與我沒有關係了。”

en: Simon Peter said to him, "Lord, not my feet only but also my hands and my head!"
zh: 西門．彼得說：“主啊，那就不單洗我的腳，連我的手和頭都洗吧！”

en: Jesus said to him, "The one who has bathed does not need to wash, except for his feet, but is completely clean. And you are clean, but not every one of you."
zh: 耶穌說：“洗過澡的人，全身都潔淨，只需要洗腳就可以了。你們是潔淨的，但不是人人都是這樣。”

en: For he knew who was to betray him; that was why he said, "Not all of you are clean."
zh: 原來耶穌知道誰要出賣他，所以他說“你們不是人人都是潔淨的”。

en: When he had washed their feet and put on his outer garments and resumed his place, he said to them, "Do you understand what I have done to you?
zh: 耶穌洗完了門徒的腳，就穿上外衣，再坐下來，對他們說：“我給你們作的，你們明白嗎？

en: You call me Teacher and Lord, and you are right, for so I am.
zh: 你們稱呼我‘老師，主’，你們說得對，我本來就是。

en: If I then, your Lord and Teacher, have washed your feet, you also ought to wash one another's feet.
zh: 我是主，是老師，尚且洗你們的腳，你們也應當彼此洗腳。

en: For I have given you an example, that you also should do just as I have done to you.
zh: 我作了你們的榜樣，是要你們也照著我所作的去行。

en: Truly, truly, I say to you, a servant is not greater than his master, nor is a messenger greater than the one who sent him.
zh: 我實實在在告訴你們，僕人不能大過主人，奉差遣的也不能大過差他的人。

en: If you know these things, blessed are you if you do them.
zh: 你們既然知道這些事，如果去實行，就有福了。

en: I am not speaking of all of you; I know whom I have chosen. But the Scripture will be fulfilled, 'He who ate my bread has lifted his heel against me.'
zh: 我這話不是指著你們全體說的；我認識我所揀選的人，但是經上的話：‘那吃我飯的，用他的腳踢我’，必須應驗。

en: I am telling you this now, before it takes place, that when it does take place you may believe that I am he.
zh: 現在，事情還沒有發生，我就告訴你們，使你們到時可以信我就是‘那一位’。

en: Truly, truly, I say to you, whoever receives the one I send receives me, and whoever receives me receives the one who sent me."
zh: 我實實在在告訴你們，那接待我所差遣的，就是接待我；接待我的，就是接待那差我來的。”

en: After saying these things, Jesus was troubled in his spirit, and testified, "Truly, truly, I say to you, one of you will betray me."
zh: 耶穌說了這話，心裡很難過，就明明地說：“我實實在在告訴你們，你們中間有一個人要出賣我。”

en: The disciples looked at one another, uncertain of whom he spoke.
zh: 門徒面面相覷，不知道他是指著誰說的。

en: One of his disciples, whom Jesus loved, was reclining at table close to Jesus,
zh: 門徒中有一個人，是耶穌所愛的，側身挨近耶穌 。

en: so Simon Peter motioned to him to ask Jesus of whom he was speaking.
zh: 西門．彼得向他示意，叫他問耶穌是指著誰說的。

en: So that disciple, leaning back against Jesus, said to him, "Lord, who is it?"
zh: 於是那個門徒貼近耶穌的胸懷，問他：“主啊，是誰呢？”

en: Jesus answered, "It is he to whom I will give this morsel of bread when I have dipped it." So when he had dipped the morsel, he gave it to Judas, the son of Simon Iscariot.
zh: 耶穌回答：“我蘸一小塊餅給誰，誰就是了。”於是他蘸了一小塊餅，遞給加略人西門的兒子猶大。

en: Then after he had taken the morsel, Satan entered into him. Jesus said to him, "What you are going to do, do quickly."
zh: 猶大接過餅以後，撒但就進入他的心。耶穌對他說：“你要作的，快去作吧。”

en: Now no one at the table knew why he said this to him.
zh: 在座的人，沒有一個知道耶穌為甚麼對猶大說這話。

en: Some thought that, because Judas had the moneybag, Jesus was telling him, "Buy what we need for the feast," or that he should give something to the poor.
zh: 猶大是管錢的，所以有人以為耶穌叫他去買過節用的東西，或是吩咐他拿點東西去賙濟窮人。

en: So, after receiving the morsel of bread, he immediately went out. And it was night.
zh: 猶大吃了餅，立刻就出去；那時是黑夜了。

en: When he had gone out, Jesus said, "Now is the Son of Man glorified, and God is glorified in him.
zh: 他出去以後，耶穌就說：“現在人子得了榮耀， 神也在人子身上得了榮耀，

en: If God is glorified in him, God will also glorify him in himself, and glorify him at once.
zh: 也要在自己身上榮耀人子，並且要立刻榮耀他。

en: Little children, yet a little while I am with you. You will seek me, and just as I said to the Jews, so now I also say to you, 'Where I am going you cannot come.'
zh: 孩子們啊，我跟你們在一起的時候不多了。你們要尋找我，但是我對猶太人說過，現在也照樣對你們說：‘我去的地方，是你們不能去的。’

en: A new commandment I give to you, that you love one another: just as I have loved you, you also are to love one another.
zh: 我給你們一條新命令，就是要你們彼此相愛；我怎樣愛你們，你們也要怎樣彼此相愛。

en: By this all people will know that you are my disciples, if you have love for one another."
zh: 如果你們彼此相愛，眾人就會認出你們是我的門徒了。”

en: Simon Peter said to him, "Lord, where are you going?" Jesus answered him, "Where I am going you cannot follow me now, but you will follow afterward."
zh: 西門．彼得對耶穌說：“主啊，你往哪裡去？”耶穌回答：“我去的地方，你現在不能跟著我去，但後來卻要跟著我去。”

en: Peter said to him, "Lord, why can I not follow you now? I will lay down my life for you."
zh: 彼得說：“主啊，為甚麼我現在不能跟著你去？為了你，我捨命也願意！”

en: Jesus answered, "Will you lay down your life for me? Truly, truly, I say to you, the rooster will not crow till you have denied me three times.
zh: 耶穌說：“你願意為我捨命嗎？我實實在在告訴你，雞叫之前，你必定三次不認我。”
